steps.title: Substitute and solve
steps.content:
Substitute $$y = -2x$$ into the second equation:
$$3x + (-2x) = 40$$
Combine like terms:
$$x = 40$$
The answer is 40.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: The correct answer is $40$. It's given in the first equation of the system that $y=-2x$. Substituting $-2x$ for $y$ in the second equation of the system yields $3x+\left(-2x\right)=40$. Combining like terms on the left-hand side of this equation yields $x=40$. Therefore, the value of $x$ is $40$.
